sentences.target: Je tords le torchon dans l’évier.

translations.fr: Je tords le torchon dans l’évier.
translations.en: I wring the dishcloth in the sink.
translations.es: Escurro el trapo en el fregadero.
translations.de: Ich wringe den Lappen im Spülbecken aus.
translations.pt: Eu torço o pano na pia.
translations.vi: Tôi vắt khăn lau trong bồn rửa.
translations.nl: Ik wring de vaatdoek uit in de gootsteen.
translations.hi: मैं सिंक में कपड़ा निचोड़ता हूँ.
translations.id: Saya memeras kain lap di wastafel.
translations.sv: Jag vrider ur trasan i diskhon.

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; means to wring/twist.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the noun 'torchon'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of the verb.
Preposition introducing the location phrase.
Elided definite article before vowel-initial noun.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Tu tords le câble sans faire exprès.
sentences.reading: /ty tɔʁ lə kabl sɑ̃ fɛʁ ɛkspʁɛ/

translations.fr: Tu tords le câble sans faire exprès.
translations.ipa: /ty tɔʁ lə kabl sɑ̃ fɛʁ ɛkspʁɛ/
translations.en: You’re twisting the cable by accident.
translations.es: Estás torciendo el cable sin querer.
translations.de: Du verdrehst das Kabel aus Versehen.
translations.it: Stai torcendo il cavo per sbaglio.
translations.zh-Hans: 你不小心把充电线拧弯了。
translations.yue: 你唔小心扭緊條充電線。
translations.pt: Você está torcendo o cabo sem querer.
translations.vi: Bạn vô tình đang vặn dây sạc.
translations.nl: Je draait per ongeluk de kabel.
translations.hi: तुम गलती से केबल मरोड़ रहे हो.
translations.nb: Du vrir kabelen ved et uhell.
translations.da: Du vrider kablet ved et uheld.
translations.ja: うっかりケーブルをねじっている。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative 2nd person singular.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing 'câble'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of the verb.
Preposition meaning 'without', introducing an infinitive clause.
Infinitive verb complement after 'sans' in the idiom 'sans faire exprès'.
Adverb meaning 'deliberately', complement of 'faire' in the fixed expression.

sentences.target: Elle tord la serviette pour l’essorer.

translations.fr: Elle tord la serviette pour l’essorer.
translations.en: She wrings the towel to get the water out.
translations.es: Ella escurre la toalla para sacar el agua.
translations.de: Sie wringt das Handtuch aus, um das Wasser herauszubekommen.
translations.it: Strizza l'asciugamano per far uscire l'acqua.
translations.yue: 佢扭乾條毛巾以擠出啲水。
translations.ru: Она выкручивает полотенце, чтобы выжать воду.
translations.pt: Ela torce a toalha para tirar a água.
translations.he: היא סוחטת את המגבת כדי להוציא את המים.
translations.vi: Cô ấy vắt khăn tắm để ra hết nước.
translations.nl: Ze wringt de handdoek uit om het water eruit te krijgen.
translations.uk: Вона віджимає рушник, щоб видалити воду.
translations.hu: Kicsavarja a törölközőt, hogy kijöjjön belőle a víz.
translations.hi: वह पानी निकालने के लिए तौलिया निचोड़ती है.
translations.pl: Ona wyciska ręcznik, żeby pozbyć się wody.
translations.el: Στύβει την πετσέτα για να βγει το νερό.
translations.nb: Hun vrir håndkleet for å få ut vannet.
translations.id: Dia memeras handuk untuk mengeluarkan air.
translations.sv: Hon vrider ur handduken för att få ut vattnet.
translations.ro: Ea stoarce prosopul ca să iasă apa.
translations.cs: Ona ždímá ručník, aby z něj vytekla voda.
translations.da: Hun vrider håndklædet for at få vandet ud.
translations.fi: Hän vääntää pyyhettä, jotta vesi lähtee pois.
translations.ja: 水を出すためにタオルを絞る。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing 'serviette'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of the verb.
Preposition introducing an infinitive of purpose.
Elided object clitic pronoun referring to 'serviette' (feminine), placed before the infinitive.
Infinitive verb complement of 'pour' expressing purpose.

sentences.target: Il faut tordre le linge avant d’étendre.
sentences.reading: /il fo tɔʁdʁ lə lɛ̃ʒ avɑ̃ detɑ̃dʁ/

translations.fr: Il faut tordre le linge avant d’étendre.
translations.ipa: /il fo tɔʁdʁ lə lɛ̃ʒ avɑ̃ detɑ̃dʁ/
translations.en: You have to wring the clothes before hanging them.
translations.es: Hay que escurrir la ropa antes de tenderla.
translations.de: Man muss die Wäsche auswringen, bevor man sie aufhängt.
translations.it: Bisogna strizzare i panni prima di stenderli.
translations.zh-Hans: 晾之前必须把衣服拧干。
translations.pt: É preciso torcer as roupas antes de pendurá-las.
translations.he: צריך לסחוט את הבגדים לפני שתולים אותם.
translations.vi: Phải vắt quần áo trước khi phơi.
translations.nl: Je moet de kleren uitwringen voordat je ze ophangt.
translations.hu: Ki kell csavarni a ruhákat, mielőtt kiteregeted őket.
translations.hi: कपड़े टांगने से पहले उन्हें निचोड़ना ज़रूरी है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να στύψεις τα ρούχα πριν τα απλώσεις.
translations.nb: Du må vri klærne før du henger dem opp.
translations.id: Kamu harus memeras pakaian sebelum menjemurnya.
translations.sv: Du måste vrida ur kläderna innan du hänger upp dem.
translations.ro: Trebuie să storci hainele înainte să le atârni.
translations.cs: Musíš vyždímat prádlo, než ho pověsíš.
translations.da: Du skal vride tøjet, før du hænger det op.
translations.fi: Vaatteet pitää vääntää ennen kuin ne ripustetaan.
translations.ja: 干す前に洗濯物を絞らないといけない。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun in the expression 'il faut'.
Impersonal verb, present 3rd person singular; expresses necessity.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of 'faut'.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing 'linge'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'tordre'.
Preposition introducing a temporal phrase with infinitive ('avant de + inf').
Elided preposition 'de' used in the construction 'avant de' before a vowel.
Infinitive verb complement after 'avant de', meaning to hang/spread out.
